tools.name: search_supplements
tools.description: Search for supplements by name, ingredient, or health benefit. Returns ranked products with trust scores, prices, and affiliate-tagged purchase links.

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Retrieve detailed data for a specific supplement product: full ingredient profile, trust score, third-party certifications, pricing, and evidence summary.

tools.name: compare_supplements
tools.description: Head-to-head comparison of two supplements. Returns key differences, evidence quality, best use cases, safety notes, and a verdict with affiliate purchase links.

tools.name: get_price_history
tools.description: Retrieve price history and freshness data for a supplement product. Shows current price, historical observations, and price trend.

tools.name: recommend_for_goal
tools.description: Get evidence-ranked supplement recommendations for a specific health goal, with optional budget and demographic filters. Returns the top products with a "why" explanation.

description: Query the DOI-backed HAA Supplement Evidence Density Map 2026. Returns dataset version, denominator, methods, canonical citation, and filtered rows from the published CSV. Contains no affiliate links. Use only for public, non-personal evidence questions. Do not call this tool for requests involving

labels.name: compare_evidence
labels.description: Compare mapped human-evidence strength and limitations for two to five supplements for the same goal. This is an evidence comparison, not a product ranking or purchase recommendation, and contains no affiliate links. Use only for public, non-personal evidence questions. Do not call this tool for req

labels.name: search_supplements
labels.description: Legacy commerce tool. Search catalog products by name, ingredient, or brand. Results may contain affiliate URLs; use search_evidence for commerce-free clinical evidence.

labels.name: get_product
labels.description: Legacy commerce tool. Retrieve product-quality, certification, price, availability, and affiliate purchase data. Use get_evidence_summary for clinical evidence.

labels.name: compare_supplements
labels.description: Legacy comparison tool that may include catalog and affiliate data. Use compare_evidence for a commerce-free evidence comparison.

labels.name: get_price_history
labels.description: Legacy commerce tool. Retrieve retailer price observations and freshness; contains no clinical efficacy conclusion.

labels.name: recommend_for_goal
labels.description: Legacy commerce tool. Returns catalog/product rankings and may contain affiliate URLs. Rankings are not clinical-evidence grades or personalized advice.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: search_evidence, search_supplements · Private data: search_evidence, get_evidence_summary, get_citations, query_evidence_map, compare_evidence · Public sink: search_evidence, get_evidence_summary, get_citations, query_evidence_map, compare_evidence.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: search_evidence, search_supplements · Private data: search_evidence, get_evidence_summary, get_citations, query_evidence_map, compare_evidence · Public sink: search_evidence, get_evidence_summary, get_citations, query_evidence_map, compare_evidence

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "search_supplements" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Search for supplements by name, ingredient, or health benefit. Returns ranked products with trust scores, prices, and affiliate-tagged purchase links." → after: "Legacy commerce tool. Search catalog products by name, ingredient, or brand. Results may contain affiliate URLs; use search_evidence for commerce-free clinical evidence."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
